mapper.select:
WITH stock_move AS ( /* 입고 */ SELECT i.item_cd ,i.test_no ,i.expiry_date ,m.tran_date ,m.to_storage_cd AS storage_cd ,i.qty AS qty FROM tb_inv_tran_item i JOIN tb_inv_tran_mst m ON i.tran_id = m.tran_id WHERE i.item_cd = #{itemCd} AND m.tran_status = 'C' AND m.to_storage_cd IS NOT NULL UNION ALL /* 출고 */ SELECT i.item_cd ,i.test_no ,i.expiry_date ,m.tran_date ,m.from_storage_cd AS storage_cd ,i.qty * -1 AS qty FROM tb_inv_tran_item i JOIN tb_inv_tran_mst m ON i.tran_id = m.tran_id WHERE i.item_cd = #{itemCd} AND m.tran_status = 'C' AND m.from_storage_cd IS NOT NULL ), base AS ( SELECT sm.item_cd ,sm.test_no ,sm.expiry_date ,sm.storage_cd ,SUM(sm.qty) AS qty FROM stock_move sm JOIN tb_storage_mst s ON sm.storage_cd = s.storage_cd WHERE s.area_cd = #{areaCd} AND ISNULL(s.use_yn, 'Y') = 'Y' GROUP BY sm.item_cd, sm.test_no, sm.expiry_date, sm.storage_cd ), in_date AS ( SELECT i.item_cd ,i.test_no ,i.expiry_date ,MIN(m.tran_date) AS in_date FROM tb_inv_tran_item i JOIN tb_inv_tran_mst m ON i.tran_id = m.tran_id WHERE i.item_cd = #{itemCd} AND m.tran_status = 'C' AND m.to_storage_cd IS NOT NULL GROUP BY i.item_cd, i.test_no, i.expiry_date ) SELECT b.item_cd AS itemCd ,b.test_no AS testNo ,d.in_date AS inDate ,b.expiry_date AS expiryDate ,
SUM(CASE WHEN b.storage_cd = #{storageCd} THEN b.qty ELSE 0 END) AS [${storageCd}]
,
SUM(CASE WHEN b.storage_cd = #{storageCd} THEN b.qty ELSE 0 END) AS totQty
FROM base b LEFT JOIN in_date d ON b.item_cd = d.item_cd AND ISNULL(b.test_no, '') = ISNULL(d.test_no, '') AND ISNULL(b.expiry_date, '1900-01-01') = ISNULL(d.expiry_date, '1900-01-01') GROUP BY b.item_cd, b.test_no, d.in_date, b.expiry_date HAVING
SUM(CASE WHEN b.storage_cd = #{storageCd} THEN b.qty ELSE 0 END) > 0 ORDER BY b.test_no
